hero.eyebrow: AI & IT Consulting · Frankfurt am Main
hero.title: Practical AI that grows revenue and cuts costs for local business
hero.subtitle: I help Frankfurt-area businesses use AI to win more customers, answer them faster, and spend less time on admin — without the hype and without a big IT department.

chat.title: Chat with me
chat.placeholder: Ask me anything about AI for local business…
chat.clear: Are you sure you want to clear this conversation?
chat.enterApiKey: Enter your API key to connect to the Gemini Chat Service:

about.title: Three decades of enterprise IT, focused on your business
about.body: I'm an independent IT consultant with more than 35 years delivering mission-critical systems in banking and telecommunications — industries where reliability, security and measurable results are non-negotiable. Today I bring that same discipline to small and mid-sized businesses around Frankfurt, helping owners adopt AI tools that pay for themselves. No jargon, no risky experiments: just proven technology applied to your real problems.
about.point1: I sit with you, understand the business, and recommend only what earns its keep.
about.point2: I handle the technical build and integration so your team doesn't have to.
about.point3: I stay on to run, upgrade and adjust things as you grow.

services.eyebrow: What I can do for you
services.title: AI that does real work in your business
services.subtitle: Concrete, affordable improvements — most can be live within weeks. Mix and match what fits.

items.title: Automated customer service
items.desc: AI chatbots and auto-replies that answer FAQs (opening hours, location, services) on your website, Meta Business Suite and WhatsApp Business — so customers get instant answers, day or night.

items.title: Intelligent answering & call handling
items.desc: AI voice assistants that answer incoming calls, take messages and book appointments when your staff are busy — so you never miss a lead.

items.title: Marketing content & copy
items.desc: Generate engaging social posts, promotional emails and local ad copy in your tone of voice, in German and English, in a fraction of the time.

items.title: AI graphic design
items.desc: Professional flyers, social graphics and resized images created from simple prompts with tools like Canva Magic Studio — no design agency required.

items.title: Automated scheduling
items.desc: Self-service booking with Calendly or Square Appointments: customers schedule and reschedule themselves and get automatic reminders, cutting no-shows.

items.title: Meeting notes & transcription
items.desc: AI assistants that join your calls, transcribe them and pull out action items automatically, so nothing important slips through.

items.title: Workflow & back-office automation
items.desc: Connect the tools you already use to remove repetitive manual work — invoice handling, data entry, follow-ups and reporting that run themselves.

items.title: Local SEO & online visibility
items.desc: AI-assisted Google Business Profile, reviews and content so nearby customers find you first when they search.

items.title: Data insights & dashboards
items.desc: Turn your sales and customer data into clear, plain-language dashboards so you can see what's working and decide with confidence.

items.title: Secure & compliant adoption
items.desc: GDPR-aware setup and staff training so you get the upside of AI while keeping customer data safe and compliant.

approach.title: A clear path from idea to results
approach.subtitle: Every engagement follows the same simple, low-risk path. You're in control at each step.

steps.title: 1 · Consultancy
steps.desc: We sit down together — in person or online — and look at your business. I learn how you work, where time and money are leaking, and where AI can realistically help. You leave with a prioritised, plain-language plan.

steps.title: 2 · Build, setup & integration
steps.desc: I select, configure and connect the right tools, integrate them with the systems you already use, and test everything end-to-end. You get working solutions, not a list of suggestions.

steps.title: 3 · Operations & support
steps.desc: I keep things running: monitoring, upgrades, changes and improvements as your needs evolve and the technology moves on. You always have someone to call.

pricing.title: Transparent pricing for each stage
pricing.subtitle: Pick a single stage or the full journey. Indicative pricing — every business is different, so your exact quote follows the free discovery call.
pricing.currencyNote: All prices in EUR, excl. VAT (USt.).

contact.title: Let's talk about your business
contact.subtitle: Tell me a little about what you'd like to improve. I'll reply personally to arrange a free, no-obligation discovery call.
contact.name: Your name
contact.messagePlaceholder: e.g. We miss too many phone calls and want customers to be able to book online…

footer.tagline: Practical AI & IT consulting for local business in the Frankfurt Rhine-Main region.

impressum.title: Impressum
impressum.intro: Information pursuant to § 5 DDG (Digital Services Act, Germany).
impressum.vatBody: VAT ID pursuant to § 27a German VAT Act (UStG):
impressum.disputeBody: The European Commission provides a platform for online dispute resolution (ODR): https://ec.europa.eu/consumers/odr/. My email address is shown above. I am neither obliged nor willing to participate in dispute resolution proceedings before a consumer arbitration board.
impressum.liabilityBody: As a service provider, I am responsible for my own content on these pages in accordance with general laws. However, I am not obliged to monitor transmitted or stored third-party information or to investigate circumstances that indicate illegal activity. Obligations to remove or block the use of information under general laws remain unaffected.
impressum.liabilityLinksBody: My site contains links to external third-party websites over whose content I have no influence. Therefore, I cannot accept any liability for this third-party content. The respective provider or operator of the linked pages is always responsible for their content.
impressum.copyrightBody: The content and works created by the site operator on these pages are subject to German copyright law. Contributions by third parties are marked as such. Reproduction, editing, distribution and any kind of use outside the limits of copyright law require written consent.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This privacy policy explains how personal data is handled when you visit this website. Protecting your data matters to me, and I process it only in accordance with the EU General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and German data protection law.
privacy.controllerBody: The party responsible for data processing on this website is the service provider named in the Impressum. You can find the contact details there.
privacy.hostingBody: This website is hosted on GitHub Pages, a service of GitHub, Inc. When you visit the site, GitHub automatically collects and stores server log data (including your IP address, browser type, date and time of access) for security and stability. This processing is based on my legitimate interest (Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR) in a secure, reliable website. GitHub may process data in the USA; please see GitHub's own privacy statement for details.
privacy.collectHeading: 3. Data you provide via the contact form
privacy.collectBody: When you use the contact form, I collect the name, email address and any other details you choose to enter (company, phone, your message). This data is used solely to respond to your enquiry. The legal basis is Art. 6(1)(a) GDPR (consent) and Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR (pre-contractual measures). Form submissions are transmitted to and stored in a Google Sheet (Google Ireland Ltd.). I delete enquiry data once it is no longer required and no statutory retention periods apply.
privacy.captchaBody: To protect the contact form from automated abuse, I use Google reCAPTCHA (Google Ireland Ltd.). reCAPTCHA analyses information such as your IP address, time spent on the site and mouse movements to distinguish humans from bots. This data is transmitted to Google and may be processed in the USA. The legal basis is my legitimate interest (Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR) in preventing spam and abuse. Use of reCAPTCHA is subject to Google's privacy policy and terms of use.
privacy.cookiesBody: This website does not use tracking or advertising cookies. Your selected language preference is stored locally in your browser (local storage) purely to remember your choice; it is never transmitted to me. Google reCAPTCHA may set its own cookies as described above.
privacy.rightsBody: Under the GDPR you have the right to access, rectification, erasure, restriction of processing, data portability and to object to processing. You may also withdraw consent at any time with future effect, and lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority. To exercise any of these rights, contact me using the details in the Impressum.
privacy.sslBody: This site uses SSL/TLS encryption (HTTPS) for security and to protect the transmission of the content you send to me. You can recognise an encrypted connection by the lock symbol in your browser's address bar.
